popularStory.headline: Cockayne Families
popularStory.description:
Is there another Old Derbshire family with such memorabilia for the historian, with so many vicissitudes and so many dramatic episodes, as the Cokaynes? 

Derbyshire provides much of the finest scener …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecelia Vernon於1330年出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩時，她的父親Sir William Vernon18歲，母親Margaret de Stockport15歲。她於1356年與John Cockayne結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年在她的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿希布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Cecelia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecelia Vernon was born in 1330, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir William Vernon, was 18 and her mother, Margaret de Stockport, was 15. She married John Cockayne in 1356. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1369, in her hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecelia Vernon est née en 1330, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Vernon, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Stockport, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé John Cockayne en 1356. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1369, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1356 John Cockayne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. ja.lifeSummary: Cecelia Vernonが1330年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで生まれた時，父Sir William Vernonは18歳，母Margaret de Stockportは15歳であった。1356年にJohn Cockayneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1369年に故郷で39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecelia Vernon(이)가 1330년 영국 더비실르 애스h보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Vernon(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Stockport(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1356년 John Cockayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 그녀의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애스h보우른에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecelia Vernon родилась в 1330 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Vernon было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Stockport, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cockayne в 1356 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1369 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
